
<!-- rnb-text-begin -->

---
title: "Mediation Analysis 3.0"
output: html_notebook
---


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin  -->

```r
library(tidyverse) # for general data wrangling and plotting (includes ggplot2)
library(bayesplot) # for plotting
library(patchwork) # for combining plots

library(BayesianId) # for Bayesian model averaging
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


## Set Up Data


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin  -->

```r
wg_med_data = foreign::read.spss("../data/NORC Data Full Sample.sav", to.data.frame = TRUE) |> 
  select(wgtoday_BW, Racial_Progress_Scale, INCOME, Ideology, Race, WEIGHT1) |> # select relevant columns
na.omit() |> # remove rows with missing data
rename(wealthgap = wgtoday_BW, progress = Racial_Progress_Scale, income_category = INCOME, ideology = Ideology, race = Race, sample_weight = WEIGHT1) # rename variables

# recode income to lower end of each bracket (so that it's a numeric variable)
income_codes = c(0, 5, 10, 15, 20, 25, 30, 35, 40, 50, 60, 75, 85, 100, 125, 150, 175, 200)
names(income_codes) = c("Less than $5,000", "$5,000 to $9,999", "$10,000 to $14,999", "$15,000 to $19,999", "$20,000 to $24,999", "$25,000 to $29,999", "$30,000 to $34,999", "$35,000 to $39,999", "$40,000 to $49,999", "$50,000 to $59,999", "$60,000 to $74,999", "$75,000 to $84,999", "$85,000 to $99,999", "$100,000 to $124,999", "$125,000 to $149,999", "$150,000 to $174,999", "$175,000 to $199,999", "$200,000 or more")
#print(income_codes)
wg_med_data = wg_med_data |> mutate(income = income_codes[income_category])

# recode race from numbers to labels
wg_med_data = wg_med_data |> mutate(race = factor(race)) # make race a factor
race_codes = c("White", "Black", "Hispanic", "Asian-Pacific Islander")
wg_med_data = wg_med_data |> mutate(race = factor(race_codes[race]))

# rescale wealth gap estimates to be between 0 and 1 instead of 0 and 100
wg_med_data$wealthgap = wg_med_data$wealthgap/100
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


## Test Path 1 (m ~ x vs. m ~ 1)
# m = progress
# x = income + ideology + race
# y = wealthgap

##### Fit full model

<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxucGF0aDFfZnVsbF9tb2RlbCA9IGJyZWdfbGFwbGFjZShwcm9ncmVzcyB+IGluY29tZSArIGlkZW9sb2d5ICsgcmFjZSxcbiAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgZGF0YSA9IHdnX21lZF9kYXRhLFxuICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICBmYW1pbHkgPSBcIm5vcm1hbF9saW5lYXJcIilcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
path1_full_model = breg_laplace(progress ~ income + ideology + race,
                                data = wg_med_data,
                                family = "normal_linear")
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


#### Do Bayesian model averaging (BMA)

<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVjR0YwYURGZlltMWhJRDBnWW0xaEtIQmhkR2d4WDJaMWJHeGZiVzlrWld3cFhHNWdZR0FpZlE9PSAtLT5cblxuYGBgclxucGF0aDFfYm1hID0gYm1hKHBhdGgxX2Z1bGxfbW9kZWwpXG5gYGBcblxuPCEtLSBybmItc291cmNlLWVuZCAtLT5cbiJ9 -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxucGF0aDFfYm1hID0gYm1hKHBhdGgxX2Z1bGxfbW9kZWwpXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
path1_bma = bma(path1_full_model)
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


#### Get posterior term inclusion probabilities

<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxucGF0aDFfdGVzdHMgPSBzdW1tYXJ5KHBhdGgxX2JtYSwgdHlwZSA9IFwidGVybV9wcm9ic1wiKVxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
path1_tests = summary(path1_bma, type = "term_probs")
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiUmVtaW5kZXI6IGFsbCByZXN1bHRzIGFyZSBjb25kaXRpb25hbCBvbiBtb2RlbGluZyBhc3N1bXB0aW9ucy5cbiJ9 -->

```
Reminder: all results are conditional on modeling assumptions.
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVjR0YwYURGZmRHVnpkSE5jYm1CZ1lDSjkgLS0+XG5cbmBgYHJcbnBhdGgxX3Rlc3RzXG5gYGBcblxuPCEtLSBybmItc291cmNlLWVuZCAtLT5cbiJ9 -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxucGF0aDFfdGVzdHNcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
path1_tests
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-frame-begin  -->

<div data-pagedtable="false">
  <script data-pagedtable-source type="application/json">
{"columns":[{"label":[""],"name":["_rn_"],"type":[""],"align":["left"]},{"label":["p(β=0)"],"name":[1],"type":["dbl"],"align":["right"]},{"label":["p(β=0|D)"],"name":[2],"type":["chr"],"align":["left"]},{"label":["p(β≠0)"],"name":[3],"type":["dbl"],"align":["right"]},{"label":["p(β≠0|D)"],"name":[4],"type":["chr"],"align":["left"]}],"data":[{"1":"0.5","2":"<0.001","3":"0.5","4":">0.999","_rn_":"income"},{"1":"0.5","2":"<0.001","3":"0.5","4":">0.999","_rn_":"ideology"},{"1":"0.5","2":"<0.001","3":"0.5","4":">0.999","_rn_":"race"}],"options":{"columns":{"min":{},"max":[10],"total":[4]},"rows":{"min":[10],"max":[10],"total":[3]},"pages":{}}}
  </script>
</div>

<!-- rnb-frame-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->



<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVjM1Z0YldGeWVTaHdZWFJvTVY5aWJXRXNJSFI1Y0dVZ1BTQmNJblJsY20xZmIyUmtjMXdpS1Z4dVlHQmdJbjA9IC0tPlxuXG5gYGByXG5zdW1tYXJ5KHBhdGgxX2JtYSwgdHlwZSA9IFwidGVybV9vZGRzXCIpXG5gYGBcblxuPCEtLSBybmItc291cmNlLWVuZCAtLT5cbiJ9 -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuc3VtbWFyeShwYXRoMV9ibWEsIHR5cGUgPSBcInRlcm1fb2Rkc1wiKVxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
summary(path1_bma, type = "term_odds")
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiUmVtaW5kZXI6IGFsbCByZXN1bHRzIGFyZSBjb25kaXRpb25hbCBvbiBtb2RlbGluZyBhc3N1bXB0aW9ucy5cbiJ9 -->

```
Reminder: all results are conditional on modeling assumptions.
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-frame-begin  -->

<div data-pagedtable="false">
  <script data-pagedtable-source type="application/json">
{"columns":[{"label":[""],"name":["_rn_"],"type":[""],"align":["left"]},{"label":["prior_odds"],"name":[1],"type":["S3: AsIs"],"align":["right"]},{"label":["post_odds"],"name":[2],"type":["S3: AsIs"],"align":["right"]},{"label":["BF"],"name":[3],"type":["S3: AsIs"],"align":["right"]}],"data":[{"1":"1e+00","2":"7.31e+03","3":"7.31e+03","_rn_":"income"},{"1":"1e+00","2":"3.46e+13","3":"3.46e+13","_rn_":"ideology"},{"1":"1e+00","2":"3.46e+13","3":"3.46e+13","_rn_":"race"}],"options":{"columns":{"min":{},"max":[10],"total":[3]},"rows":{"min":[10],"max":[10],"total":[3]},"pages":{}}}
  </script>
</div>

<!-- rnb-frame-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->



<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVjM1Z0YldGeWVTaHdZWFJvTVY5aWJXRXNJSFI1Y0dVZ1BTQmNJbTF2WkdWc1gyOWtaSE5jSWlsY2JtQmdZQ0o5IC0tPlxuXG5gYGByXG5zdW1tYXJ5KHBhdGgxX2JtYSwgdHlwZSA9IFwibW9kZWxfb2Rkc1wiKVxuYGBgXG5cbjwhLS0gcm5iLXNvdXJjZS1lbmQgLS0+XG4ifQ== -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuc3VtbWFyeShwYXRoMV9ibWEsIHR5cGUgPSBcIm1vZGVsX29kZHNcIilcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
summary(path1_bma, type = "model_odds")
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiUmVtaW5kZXI6IGFsbCByZXN1bHRzIGFyZSBjb25kaXRpb25hbCBvbiBtb2RlbGluZyBhc3N1bXB0aW9ucy5cbiJ9 -->

```
Reminder: all results are conditional on modeling assumptions.
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-frame-begin  -->

<div data-pagedtable="false">
  <script data-pagedtable-source type="application/json">
{"columns":[{"label":[""],"name":["_rn_"],"type":[""],"align":["left"]},{"label":["prior_odds"],"name":[1],"type":["S3: AsIs"],"align":["right"]},{"label":["post_odds"],"name":[2],"type":["S3: AsIs"],"align":["right"]},{"label":["BF"],"name":[3],"type":["S3: AsIs"],"align":["right"]}],"data":[{"1":"1e+00","2":"1.00e+00","3":"1.00e+00","_rn_":"~ income + ideology + race"},{"1":"1e+00","2":"2.92e-32","3":"2.92e-32","_rn_":"~ income + ideology"},{"1":"1e+00","2":"3.47e-26","3":"3.47e-26","_rn_":"~ income + race"},{"1":"1e+00","2":"1.37e-04","3":"1.37e-04","_rn_":"~ ideology + race"},{"1":"1e+00","2":"1.10e-59","3":"1.10e-59","_rn_":"~ income"},{"1":"1e+00","2":"1.07e-40","3":"1.07e-40","_rn_":"~ ideology"},{"1":"1e+00","2":"3.04e-30","3":"3.04e-30","_rn_":"~ race"},{"1":"1e+00","2":"2.46e-68","3":"2.46e-68","_rn_":"~ 1"}],"options":{"columns":{"min":{},"max":[10],"total":[3]},"rows":{"min":[10],"max":[10],"total":[8]},"pages":{}}}
  </script>

<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVjM1Z0YldGeWVTaHdZWFJvTVY5aWJXRXNJSFI1Y0dVZ1BTQmNJbTF2WkdWc1gzQnliMkp6WENJcFhHNWdZR0FpZlE9PSAtLT5cblxuYGBgclxuc3VtbWFyeShwYXRoMV9ibWEsIHR5cGUgPSBcIm1vZGVsX3Byb2JzXCIpXG5gYGBcblxuPCEtLSBybmItc291cmNlLWVuZCAtLT5cbiJ9 -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuc3VtbWFyeShwYXRoMV9ibWEsIHR5cGUgPSBcIm1vZGVsX3Byb2JzXCIpXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
summary(path1_bma, type = "model_probs")
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiUmVtaW5kZXI6IGFsbCByZXN1bHRzIGFyZSBjb25kaXRpb25hbCBvbiBtb2RlbGluZyBhc3N1bXB0aW9ucy5cbiJ9 -->

```
Reminder: all results are conditional on modeling assumptions.
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-frame-begin  -->

<div data-pagedtable="false">
  <script data-pagedtable-source type="application/json">
{"columns":[{"label":[""],"name":["_rn_"],"type":[""],"align":["left"]},{"label":["p(M)"],"name":[1],"type":["dbl"],"align":["right"]},{"label":["p(M | D)"],"name":[2],"type":["chr"],"align":["left"]}],"data":[{"1":"0.125","2":">0.999","_rn_":"~ income + ideology + race"},{"1":"0.125","2":"<0.001","_rn_":"~ income + ideology"},{"1":"0.125","2":"<0.001","_rn_":"~ income + race"},{"1":"0.125","2":"<0.001","_rn_":"~ ideology + race"},{"1":"0.125","2":"<0.001","_rn_":"~ income"},{"1":"0.125","2":"<0.001","_rn_":"~ ideology"},{"1":"0.125","2":"<0.001","_rn_":"~ race"},{"1":"0.125","2":"<0.001","_rn_":"~ 1"}],"options":{"columns":{"min":{},"max":[10],"total":[2]},"rows":{"min":[10],"max":[10],"total":[8]},"pages":{}}}
  </script>
</div>

<!-- rnb-frame-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVjM1Z0YldGeWVTaHdZWFJvTVY5aWJXRXNJSFI1Y0dVZ1BTQmNJbVZ6ZEZ3aUtWeHVZR0JnSW4wPSAtLT5cblxuYGBgclxuc3VtbWFyeShwYXRoMV9ibWEsIHR5cGUgPSBcImVzdFwiKVxuYGBgXG5cbjwhLS0gcm5iLXNvdXJjZS1lbmQgLS0+XG4ifQ== -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuc3VtbWFyeShwYXRoMV9ibWEsIHR5cGUgPSBcImVzdFwiKVxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
summary(path1_bma, type = "est")
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiUmVtaW5kZXI6IGFsbCByZXN1bHRzIGFyZSBjb25kaXRpb25hbCBvbiBtb2RlbGluZyBhc3N1bXB0aW9ucy5cbiJ9 -->

```
Reminder: all results are conditional on modeling assumptions.
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-frame-begin  -->

<div data-pagedtable="false">
  <script data-pagedtable-source type="application/json">
{"columns":[{"label":[""],"name":["_rn_"],"type":[""],"align":["left"]},{"label":["mean"],"name":[1],"type":["dbl"],"align":["right"]},{"label":["sd"],"name":[2],"type":["dbl"],"align":["right"]},{"label":["2.5 %"],"name":[3],"type":["dbl"],"align":["right"]},{"label":["97.5 %"],"name":[4],"type":["dbl"],"align":["right"]}],"data":[{"1":"3.36000","2":"0.026300","3":"3.31000","4":"3.75000","_rn_":"(Intercept)"},{"1":"0.00205","2":"0.000404","3":"0.00126","4":"0.00284","_rn_":"income"},{"1":"0.21900","2":"0.019100","3":"0.18200","4":"0.25700","_rn_":"ideology"},{"1":"-0.04580","2":"0.080000","3":"-0.18500","4":"0.11100","_rn_":"race1"},{"1":"-0.66600","2":"0.078200","3":"-0.81900","4":"-0.51300","_rn_":"race2"},{"1":"-0.39000","2":"0.064800","3":"-0.51700","4":"-0.26300","_rn_":"race3"}],"options":{"columns":{"min":{},"max":[10],"total":[4]},"rows":{"min":[10],"max":[10],"total":[6]},"pages":{}}}
  </script>
</div>

<!-- rnb-frame-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->



<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuY29udHJhc3QocGF0aDFfYm1hLCBmYWN0b3JzID0gXCJyYWNlXCIsIHJlZiA9IFwiV2hpdGVcIilcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
contrast(path1_bma, factors = "race", ref = "White")
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-frame-begin  -->

<div data-pagedtable="false">
  <script data-pagedtable-source type="application/json">
{"columns":[{"label":[""],"name":["_rn_"],"type":[""],"align":["left"]},{"label":["mean"],"name":[1],"type":["dbl"],"align":["right"]},{"label":["sd"],"name":[2],"type":["dbl"],"align":["right"]},{"label":["2.5 %"],"name":[3],"type":["dbl"],"align":["right"]},{"label":["97.5 %"],"name":[4],"type":["dbl"],"align":["right"]},{"label":["p(c<0|D,c≠0)"],"name":[5],"type":["chr"],"align":["left"]},{"label":["p(c>0|D,c≠0)"],"name":[6],"type":["chr"],"align":["left"]}],"data":[{"1":"-0.42469","2":"0.063570","3":"-0.54928","4":"-0.30010","5":">0.999","6":"<0.001","_rn_":"(Asian-Pacific Islander) - White"},{"1":"-0.77186","2":"0.065994","3":"-0.90121","4":"-0.64252","5":">0.999","6":"<0.001","_rn_":"Black - White"},{"1":"-0.38999","2":"0.064837","3":"-0.51705","4":"-0.26289","5":">0.999","6":"<0.001","_rn_":"Hispanic - White"}],"options":{"columns":{"min":{},"max":[10],"total":[6]},"rows":{"min":[10],"max":[10],"total":[3]},"pages":{}}}
  </script>
</div>

<!-- rnb-frame-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


## Test Path 2 (y ~ m + x)

##### Fit full model

<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin  -->

```r
path2_full_model = breg_laplace(wealthgap ~ progress + income + ideology + race,
                                data = wg_med_data,
                                family = "right_censored_linear",
                                prior_scale = 0.35)
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


Plot the distribution of the real data and the distribution of simulated data from the model.

<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVjR3h2ZENod1lYUm9NbDltZFd4c1gyMXZaR1ZzS1Z4dVlHQmdJbjA9IC0tPlxuXG5gYGByXG5wbG90KHBhdGgyX2Z1bGxfbW9kZWwpXG5gYGBcblxuPCEtLSBybmItc291cmNlLWVuZCAtLT5cbiJ9 -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxucGxvdChwYXRoMl9mdWxsX21vZGVsKVxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
plot(path2_full_model)
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-plot-begin eyJoZWlnaHQiOjQyMC44OSwid2lkdGgiOjY4MSwiZHBpIjotMSwic2l6ZV9iZWhhdmlvciI6MCwiY29uZGl0aW9ucyI6W119 -->

<img src="data:image/png;base64," />

<!-- rnb-plot-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->

Do the same for a non-censored model (i.e. basic linear regression).

<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxudXBkYXRlKHBhdGgyX2Z1bGxfbW9kZWwsIGZhbWlseSA9IFwibm9ybWFsX2xpbmVhclwiKSB8PiBwbG90KClcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
update(path2_full_model, family = "normal_linear") |> plot()
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-plot-begin eyJoZWlnaHQiOjQyMC44OSwid2lkdGgiOjY4MSwiZHBpIjotMSwic2l6ZV9iZWhhdmlvciI6MCwiY29uZGl0aW9ucyI6W119 -->

<img src="data:image/png;base64," />

<!-- rnb-plot-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


#### Do Bayesian model averaging (BMA)

<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVjR0YwYURKZlltMWhJRDBnWW0xaEtIQmhkR2d5WDJaMWJHeGZiVzlrWld3cFhHNWdZR0FpZlE9PSAtLT5cblxuYGBgclxucGF0aDJfYm1hID0gYm1hKHBhdGgyX2Z1bGxfbW9kZWwpXG5gYGBcblxuPCEtLSBybmItc291cmNlLWVuZCAtLT5cbiJ9 -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxucGF0aDJfYm1hID0gYm1hKHBhdGgyX2Z1bGxfbW9kZWwpXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
path2_bma = bma(path2_full_model)
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


#### Get posterior term inclusion probabilities

<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxucGF0aDJfdGVzdHMgPSBzdW1tYXJ5KHBhdGgyX2JtYSwgdHlwZSA9IFwidGVybV9wcm9ic1wiKVxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
path2_tests = summary(path2_bma, type = "term_probs")
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiUmVtaW5kZXI6IGFsbCByZXN1bHRzIGFyZSBjb25kaXRpb25hbCBvbiBtb2RlbGluZyBhc3N1bXB0aW9ucy5cbiJ9 -->

```
Reminder: all results are conditional on modeling assumptions.
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVjR0YwYURKZmRHVnpkSE5jYm1CZ1lDSjkgLS0+XG5cbmBgYHJcbnBhdGgyX3Rlc3RzXG5gYGBcblxuPCEtLSBybmItc291cmNlLWVuZCAtLT5cbiJ9 -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxucGF0aDJfdGVzdHNcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
path2_tests
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-frame-begin  -->

<div data-pagedtable="false">
  <script data-pagedtable-source type="application/json">
{"columns":[{"label":[""],"name":["_rn_"],"type":[""],"align":["left"]},{"label":["p(β=0)"],"name":[1],"type":["dbl"],"align":["right"]},{"label":["p(β=0|D)"],"name":[2],"type":["chr"],"align":["left"]},{"label":["p(β≠0)"],"name":[3],"type":["dbl"],"align":["right"]},{"label":["p(β≠0|D)"],"name":[4],"type":["chr"],"align":["left"]}],"data":[{"1":"0.5","2":"<0.001","3":"0.5","4":">0.999","_rn_":"progress"},{"1":"0.5","2":"0.018","3":"0.5","4":"0.982","_rn_":"income"},{"1":"0.5","2":"<0.001","3":"0.5","4":">0.999","_rn_":"ideology"},{"1":"0.5","2":"<0.001","3":"0.5","4":">0.999","_rn_":"race"}],"options":{"columns":{"min":{},"max":[10],"total":[4]},"rows":{"min":[10],"max":[10],"total":[4]},"pages":{}}}
  </script>
</div>

<!-- rnb-frame-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->



<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVjM1Z0YldGeWVTaHdZWFJvTWw5aWJXRXNJSFI1Y0dVZ1BTQmNJbVZ6ZEZ3aUtWeHVZR0JnSW4wPSAtLT5cblxuYGBgclxuc3VtbWFyeShwYXRoMl9ibWEsIHR5cGUgPSBcImVzdFwiKVxuYGBgXG5cbjwhLS0gcm5iLXNvdXJjZS1lbmQgLS0+XG4ifQ== -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuc3VtbWFyeShwYXRoMl9ibWEsIHR5cGUgPSBcImVzdFwiKVxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
summary(path2_bma, type = "est")
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiUmVtaW5kZXI6IGFsbCByZXN1bHRzIGFyZSBjb25kaXRpb25hbCBvbiBtb2RlbGluZyBhc3N1bXB0aW9ucy5cbiJ9 -->

```
Reminder: all results are conditional on modeling assumptions.
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-frame-begin  -->

<div data-pagedtable="false">
  <script data-pagedtable-source type="application/json">
{"columns":[{"label":[""],"name":["_rn_"],"type":[""],"align":["left"]},{"label":["mean"],"name":[1],"type":["dbl"],"align":["right"]},{"label":["sd"],"name":[2],"type":["dbl"],"align":["right"]},{"label":["2.5 %"],"name":[3],"type":["dbl"],"align":["right"]},{"label":["97.5 %"],"name":[4],"type":["dbl"],"align":["right"]}],"data":[{"1":"0.5810","2":"0.008960","3":"0.56300","4":"0.655000","_rn_":"(Intercept)"},{"1":"0.1010","2":"0.009030","3":"0.08360","4":"0.119000","_rn_":"progress"},{"1":"-0.0005","2":"0.000136","3":"-0.00053","4":"-0.000137","_rn_":"income"},{"1":"0.0482","2":"0.006730","3":"0.03500","4":"0.061400","_rn_":"ideology"},{"1":"0.0102","2":"0.025000","3":"-0.04800","4":"0.059100","_rn_":"race1"},{"1":"-0.1650","2":"0.027000","3":"-0.22800","4":"-0.123000","_rn_":"race2"},{"1":"-0.0632","2":"0.021800","3":"-0.11700","4":"-0.020400","_rn_":"race3"}],"options":{"columns":{"min":{},"max":[10],"total":[4]},"rows":{"min":[10],"max":[10],"total":[7]},"pages":{}}}
  </script>
</div>

<!-- rnb-frame-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->



<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuY29udHJhc3QocGF0aDJfYm1hLCBmYWN0b3JzID0gXCJyYWNlXCIsIHJlZiA9IFwiV2hpdGVcIilcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
contrast(path2_bma, factors = "race", ref = "White")
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-frame-begin  -->

<div data-pagedtable="false">
  <script data-pagedtable-source type="application/json">
{"columns":[{"label":[""],"name":["_rn_"],"type":[""],"align":["left"]},{"label":["mean"],"name":[1],"type":["dbl"],"align":["right"]},{"label":["sd"],"name":[2],"type":["dbl"],"align":["right"]},{"label":["2.5 %"],"name":[3],"type":["dbl"],"align":["right"]},{"label":["97.5 %"],"name":[4],"type":["dbl"],"align":["right"]},{"label":["p(c<0|D,c≠0)"],"name":[5],"type":["chr"],"align":["left"]},{"label":["p(c>0|D,c≠0)"],"name":[6],"type":["chr"],"align":["left"]}],"data":[{"1":"-0.071020","2":"0.020555","3":"-0.13116","4":"-0.038358","5":">0.999","6":"<0.001","_rn_":"(Asian-Pacific Islander) - White"},{"1":"-0.174780","2":"0.023179","3":"-0.23768","4":"-0.140030","5":">0.999","6":"<0.001","_rn_":"Black - White"},{"1":"-0.063173","2":"0.021801","3":"-0.11681","4":"-0.020446","5":"0.998","6":"0.002","_rn_":"Hispanic - White"}],"options":{"columns":{"min":{},"max":[10],"total":[6]},"rows":{"min":[10],"max":[10],"total":[3]},"pages":{}}}
  </script>
</div>

<!-- rnb-frame-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->



<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVjR0YwYURKZlpuVnNiRjl0YjJSbGJDUmtZWFJoSkhKaFkyVWdmRDRnWTI5dWRISmhjM1J6S0NsY2JtQmdZQ0o5IC0tPlxuXG5gYGByXG5wYXRoMl9mdWxsX21vZGVsJGRhdGEkcmFjZSB8PiBjb250cmFzdHMoKVxuYGBgXG5cbjwhLS0gcm5iLXNvdXJjZS1lbmQgLS0+XG4ifQ== -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxucGF0aDJfZnVsbF9tb2RlbCRkYXRhJHJhY2UgfD4gY29udHJhc3RzKClcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
path2_full_model$data$race |> contrasts()
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->

```
                             [,1]       [,2] [,3]
Asian-Pacific Islander  0.6123724  0.0000000  0.0
Black                  -0.2041241  0.5773503  0.0
Hispanic               -0.2041241 -0.2886751  0.5
White                  -0.2041241 -0.2886751 -0.5
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


## Estimate Censored Values of "wealthgap"

We'll take a simple approach. Because the full model has a very high posterior probability (0.982), to start we will only use it.

<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuc3VtbWFyeShwYXRoMl9ibWEsIHR5cGUgPSBcIm1vZGVsX3Byb2JzXCIpW1wifiBwcm9ncmVzcyArIGluY29tZSArIGlkZW9sb2d5ICsgcmFjZVwiLF1cbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
summary(path2_bma, type = "model_probs")["~ progress + income + ideology + race",]
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiUmVtaW5kZXI6IGFsbCByZXN1bHRzIGFyZSBjb25kaXRpb25hbCBvbiBtb2RlbGluZyBhc3N1bXB0aW9ucy5cbiJ9 -->

```
Reminder: all results are conditional on modeling assumptions.
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-frame-begin  -->

<div data-pagedtable="false">
  <script data-pagedtable-source type="application/json">
{"columns":[{"label":[""],"name":["_rn_"],"type":[""],"align":["left"]},{"label":["p(M)"],"name":[1],"type":["dbl"],"align":["right"]},{"label":["p(M | D)"],"name":[2],"type":["chr"],"align":["left"]}],"data":[{"1":"0.062","2":"0.982","_rn_":"~ progress + income + ideology + race"}],"options":{"columns":{"min":{},"max":[10],"total":[2]},"rows":{"min":[10],"max":[10],"total":[1]},"pages":{}}}
  </script>
</div>

<!-- rnb-frame-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->

To keep it simple, we'll start by only using the posterior means of the parameter estimates.

<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin  -->

```r
b0_mean = path2_full_model$post_mean[1]
b_mean = matrix(path2_full_model$post_mean[-1], ncol = 1)
wg_med_data = wg_med_data |> 
  mutate(wealthgap_pred = b0_mean + path2_full_model$stan_data$X %*% b_mean,
         censored = wealthgap == max(wealthgap))
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


Plot predicted vs. actual values.

<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxud2dfbWVkX2RhdGEgfD4gZ2dwbG90KGFlcyh4ID0gd2VhbHRoZ2FwLCB5ID0gd2VhbHRoZ2FwX3ByZWQsIGNvbG9yID0gY2Vuc29yZWQpKSArIGdlb21fcG9pbnQoKSArIHRoZW1lX2J3KCkgKyB4bGltKGMoMCwgMSkpICsgeWxpbShjKDAsIDEpKVxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
wg_med_data |> ggplot(aes(x = wealthgap, y = wealthgap_pred, color = censored)) + geom_point() + theme_bw() + xlim(c(0, 1)) + ylim(c(0, 1))
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-plot-begin eyJoZWlnaHQiOjQyMC44OSwid2lkdGgiOjY4MSwiZHBpIjotMSwic2l6ZV9iZWhhdmlvciI6MCwiY29uZGl0aW9ucyI6W119 -->

<img src="data:image/png;base64," />

<!-- rnb-plot-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


How many predicted values are greater than 1?

<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVkR0ZpYkdVb2QyZGZiV1ZrWDJSaGRHRWtkMlZoYkhSb1oyRndYM0J5WldRZ1BpQXhLVnh1WUdCZ0luMD0gLS0+XG5cbmBgYHJcbnRhYmxlKHdnX21lZF9kYXRhJHdlYWx0aGdhcF9wcmVkID4gMSlcbmBgYFxuXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtZW5kIC0tPlxuIn0= -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxudGFibGUod2dfbWVkX2RhdGEkd2VhbHRoZ2FwX3ByZWQgPiAxKVxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
table(wg_med_data$wealthgap_pred > 1)
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG5GQUxTRSBcbiAxMzkwIFxuIn0= -->

```

FALSE 
 1390 
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


This is surprising: I expected that the predicted values would be largely greater than 1 (the censoring limit).

<!-- rnb-text-end -->
